items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ETFs record weekly inflows amid price weakness
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased inflows into Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana ETFs suggest growing institutional interest, which could enhance liquidity and support SOL's market positioning.

items.title: The Legal Strategy Behind Crypto Exchange Backpack's Token-to-Equity Program
items.whyYouShouldCare: Backpack's token-to-equity program highlights innovative legal strategies in crypto, potentially influencing how Solana projects structure their offerings and engage with investors.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) jumps 12.4% over weekend
items.whyYouShouldCare: NEAR Protocol's recent performance surge may impact Solana's competitive landscape, as it reflects investor appetite for alternative ecosystems within the broader market.
